title: RepresentationContentRecord
description: Records a structural representation content check for a candidate (M50). Written as representation_content.json by build-phase5-sidecars (P6-M3).

candidateId.description: Candidate or particle ID being checked.

expectedModeCount.description: Expected number of modes for this representation.

observedModeCount.description: Observed number of modes in the spectrum.

missingRequiredCount.description: Number of required representation content items that are absent. Triggers Fatal falsifier when > 0.

structuralMismatchScore.description: Structural mismatch score (0-1). Triggers High falsifier when > RepresentationContentThreshold.

consistent.description: Whether the mode count is consistent with the expected representation.

origin.description: Origin classification for this sidecar record.

sourceArtifactRefs.description: Artifact references used to support this record.

provenance.description: Provenance of the backend that produced this record.
